𝗔𝗨𝗧𝗢𝗦𝗞𝗜𝗟𝗟𝗦 | To automate the installation of AI agent skills based on a project's detected technology stack, streamlining the integration of AI into development.  🔥 Super Hot!

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💎 Ruby 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To automate the installation of AI agent skills based on a project's detected technology stack, streamlining the integration of AI into development.
📅 Created: Mar 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Automatic tech stack detection
✅ Curated AI agent skill registry
✅ Secure installation process
✅ No configuration required
✅ Support for a wide range of technologies


╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 5.9K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 547 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 13 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Autoskills is a command-line tool that automatically detects a project's technology stack and installs relevant AI agent skills from a curated registry. It simplifies the process of integrating AI capabilities into development workflows by handling the detection, selection, and installation of necessary skill files.

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

𝗥𝗨𝗡𝗧𝗜𝗣𝗜 | To provide an easy-to-use platform for individuals to set up and manage their own personal homeserver with various self-hosted applications.  🔥 Super Hot!

✅ Docker-based orchestration

Runtipi is a user-friendly homeserver orchestrator built with TypeScript, NestJS, and React. It simplifies the management and deployment of self-hosted applications using Docker, accessible through a web interface and an app store.

𝗣𝗢𝗟𝗬𝗖𝗨𝗧 | To enable users to repurpose their 3D printers as vinyl cutters, plotters, or engraving machines by converting SVG designs into GCode.  🔥 Super Hot!

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 Visual Basic .NET 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To enable users to repurpose their 3D printers as vinyl cutters, plotters, or engraving machines by converting SVG designs into GCode.
📅 Created: Jan 2024 • Updated: Jun 2026

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Import and manipulate SVG files (group/layer preservation, boolean operations, transformations)
✅ Support for various tool modes: Cutting, Drawing (with multiple fill patterns), Multipass, Foiling/Engraving
✅ Configurable tool path optimization for drag knives
✅ Save and reload projects, export canvas to SVG
✅ Manage multiple printer profiles with custom GCode and offsets
✅ Klipper bounding box preview for alignment confirmation
✅ 2D animated toolpath preview with pause/resume/step controls
✅ Direct upload to networked 3D printers via Moonraker/Klipper


◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 173 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 14 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 5 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Polycut is a .NET application that converts SVG files into 2D GCode, enabling 3D printers and CNC machines equipped with cutting or drawing tools to execute designs. It offers features for importing, manipulating, and previewing vector graphics, and can directly upload GCode to Klipper-enabled printers.

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

✅ Establishing and enforcing architecture principles
✅ Analyzing stakeholder drivers, goals, and outcomes
✅ Risk management (HM Treasury Orange Book)
✅ Business case justification (HM Treasury Green Book SOBC)
✅ Creating comprehensive requirements documents
✅ Data modeling with ERD, GDPR compliance, and data governance
✅ Technology research with build vs buy analysis (web search powered)
✅ Azure-specific research using Microsoft Learn MCP
✅ Strategic planning with Wardley Mapping
✅ Generating visual architecture diagrams (Mermaid)
✅ Managing vendor RFP and selection processes
✅ Conducting formal design reviews (HLD/DLD)
✅ ServiceNow service management design
✅ Maintaining requirements traceability

ArcKit is an enterprise architecture governance toolkit that streamlines strategy, design, delivery, and assurance workflows. It leverages AI assistance to manage architecture principles, stakeholder drivers, risk, business cases, requirements, data modeling, technology research, strategic planning, diagram generation, vendor management, design reviews, and traceability.

𝗧𝗛𝗨𝗡𝗗𝗘𝗥𝗕𝗢𝗟𝗧 | To provide a flexible and controllable AI client solution for enterprises and individuals who want to deploy AI models on their own infrastructure, manage their data, and avoid reliance on third-party services.  🔥 Super Hot!

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a flexible and controllable AI client solution for enterprises and individuals who want to deploy AI models on their own infrastructure, manage their data, and avoid reliance on third-party services.
📅 Created: Jul 2025 • Updated: Jun 2026

✅ Open-source, cross-platform AI client
✅ On-premise deployment
✅ Model choice (frontier, local, on-prem)
✅ Data ownership
✅ Eliminates vendor lock-in
✅ Available on web, iOS, Android, Mac, Linux, Windows
✅ Enterprise features, support, and FDEs

Thunderbolt is an open-source, cross-platform AI client designed for on-premise deployment, allowing users to choose their AI models, own their data, and avoid vendor lock-in. It supports a wide range of platforms and AI models, with features geared towards enterprise use.

𝗗𝗘𝗘𝗣𝗚𝗘𝗠𝗠 | Providing highly optimized matrix multiplication (GEMM) kernels for accelerating computations in large language models and other deep learning applications on NVIDIA GPUs.  🌟 Rising Fast!

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 Cuda 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Providing highly optimized matrix multiplication (GEMM) kernels for accelerating computations in large language models and other deep learning applications on NVIDIA GPUs.
📅 Created: Feb 2025 • Updated: Jun 2026

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Optimized GEMM kernels for FP8, FP4, and BF16 precisions
✅ Fused MoE with overlapped communication (Mega MoE)
✅ MQA scoring for lightning indexer
✅ HyperConnection (HC) support
✅ Lightweight Just-In-Time (JIT) compilation module
✅ Support for NVIDIA SM90 and SM100 architectures
✅ Clean and accessible CUDA codebase for kernel optimization learning


⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 7.3K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 1K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 48 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

DeepGEMM is a high-performance CUDA kernel library for modern large language models, offering optimized GEMM operations for various precisions (FP8, FP4, BF16) and advanced features like fused MoE and MQA scoring. It utilizes a Just-In-Time (JIT) compilation approach for flexibility and performance without requiring CUDA compilation during installation.

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬
